paragraph: The single-family market in East Rutherford is moving steadily with eight sales over six months at a median of $704,000. Sellers are seeing homes sell right around asking price, with a sale-to-list ratio of 1.01 and a median of 17.5 days on market. About 62 percent of homes sold above asking, which signals real buyer interest once a property is priced fairly. The range is wide, from $330,000 to $1.4 million, so neighborhoods and condition matter considerably. Condos and townhouses, by contrast, are more limited in volume with four sales at a median of $557,500. These homes are taking longer to move at a median of 29.5 days on market, though three out of four still sold above asking. If you're comparing tiers, the deciding factor isn't market heat. It's whether you want the space and grounds of a single-family or the low-maintenance lifestyle of a condo.
